use_cases: Creating frosted glass overlays on hero sections and cards
Adding depth and dimension to modal backdrops
Styling navigation bars with transparent blur effects
Enhancing image galleries with progressive blur transitions
Building modern landing pages with layered visual depth
ai_summary: A React component that generates multiple stacked blur layers with varying intensities using CSS backdrop-filter and linear gradient masks. It creates a sophisticated frosted glass effect where blur progressively increases toward a specified direction (top, right, bottom, left), commonly used in modern glassmorphism UI designs for hero sections, cards, and overlays.
